title: pleroma castellense
intro: Pleroma castellense, also known as Castilleja, is a flowering plant that belongs to the borage family. It is native to the Iberian Peninsula and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and expectorant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing cough and congestion, and its herbal preparations include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures. However, more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety, and it should be used under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
